entities.label: Regulation
entities.description: A law, standard, or framework (e.g., GDPR, NIST CSF).

properties.name: jurisdiction
properties.description: The geographical or legal area it applies to (e.g., 'EU', 'USA', 'Global').

properties.name: analysisType
properties.description: The method of analysis the framework uses (e.g., 'Qualitative Risk Analysis', 'Threat-based').

entities.label: Control
entities.description: A specific safeguard or requirement (e.g., Multi-Factor Authentication).

properties.name: controlCategory
properties.description: The functional area of the control (e.g., 'Access Control', 'Incident Response').

properties.name: analysisType
properties.description: The type of analysis this control supports (e.g., 'Forensic Analysis', 'Vulnerability Analysis').

entities.label: Threat
entities.description: A potential danger that can exploit a vulnerability (e.g., Phishing).

entities.label: Organization
entities.description: An entity that is subject to regulations or that issues them.

entities.label: Risk
entities.description: A potential for loss or damage when a threat exploits a vulnerability.

entities.label: Vulnerability
entities.description: A weakness in an asset or control that can be exploited by a threat.

entities.label: Asset
entities.description: A resource of value that requires protection (e.g., Customer Data).

entities.label: Tool
entities.description: A specific technology or software used to implement a control.

entities.label: Policy
entities.description: An internal GRC document that defines a set of rules or processes.

relationships.description: Connects a Regulation to a Control it requires.
Connects an Organization to a Control it has put in place.
Connects a Control to a Risk it is designed to reduce.
Connects a Control to a Vulnerability it is designed to fix.
Connects a Threat to a Vulnerability it can take advantage of.
Connects a Risk, Threat, or Vulnerability to an Asset it affects.
Connects an Organization to a Regulation it must follow.
Connects a Control or Process to a Policy document.
Connects a Control to a Tool that helps implement it.
